scope.bibleTextMutationNote: Only Laodiceans was intentionally repaired to match the selected visible Gutenberg witness; all other source-visible tranche actions were registry/metadata/blocker actions.

policy.classificationMeaning: The seven source-visible broader-canon candidates have been adjudicated into source-bound/repaired or blocked dispositions.
policy.trustBoundary: This tranche closure is not global broader-canon textual trust. Candidate rendering remains governed by each item disposition and broader-canon public-rendering policy.

items.title: 3 Corinthians
items.metadataSourceStatement: Hovhanessian source lead identifies a modern 2000 Peter Lang work; public-domain translation claim not verified

armenianZohrabNtAppendixSourceWitness.sourceVisibleImpact: 3 Corinthians now has an Armenian Zohrab appendix witness located, but candidate English text remains untrusted. Prayer of Euthalius is now the positive source-acquisition target for the Prayer of Apollonius identity review.

armenianZohrabNtAppendixExtractionSnapsh.sourceVisibleImpact: Armenian Zohrab appendix pages 735-740 now have governed source metadata and Archive DjVu OCR/page anchors, but OCR is not textually trusted and no candidate Bible text is mutated or promoted.

threeCorinthiansMrJamesSourceSelection.sourceVisibleImpact: 3 Corinthians now has a governed M. R. James English collation target, but the current candidate is related rather than exact and remains untrusted.

threeCorinthiansMrJamesRowShapeAudit.sourceVisibleImpact: 3 Corinthians M. R. James source shape is not safely overlay-compatible with the current 19-row candidate; candidate remains quarantined pending source-shape migration policy.

threeCorinthiansSourceShapeMigrationPoli.sourceVisibleImpact: 3 Corinthians requires source-shape rebuild before candidate repair; the current 19-row related/non-exact candidate remains quarantined and not app-render eligible.

threeCorinthiansMrJamesMarkerCountCorrec.sourceVisibleImpact: 3 Corinthians M. R. James source-map creation must use the corrected strict 33-row marker count; bracketed apparatus markers are excluded from active source rows.
